hub.title: Solutions
hub.subtitle: Expert guidance to help you choose, install, and maintain the right air conditioning system.

howToChoose.title: How to Choose the Right AC
howToChoose.subtitle: A step-by-step guide to selecting the perfect air conditioning unit for your space.

1.title: Calculate Your Room Size
1.body: Measure the length and width of your room. Use our AC Calculator to get a precise BTU and PK recommendation.

2.title: Consider Room Factors
2.body: South-facing rooms, kitchens, and server rooms require higher capacity. Our calculator accounts for these factors.

3.title: Choose Inverter or Non-Inverter
3.body: Inverter ACs adjust compressor speed for efficiency and quiet operation. For rooms used more than 6 hours daily, inverter is the smarter choice.

4.title: Check Voltage Requirements
4.body: Most residential units run on 220V. Larger commercial units may require 380V three-phase. Confirm your electrical supply before purchasing.

energy.title: Energy Efficiency & Inverter Guide
energy.subtitle: Understand how to save energy and reduce electricity bills with the right technology.

tips.title: Energy Saving Tips
tips.tip1: Set thermostat to 24–26°C for optimal comfort and efficiency.
tips.tip2: Clean filters monthly to maintain airflow and efficiency.
tips.tip3: Use sleep mode or timer to reduce overnight consumption.
tips.tip4: Seal gaps in windows and doors to prevent cool air from escaping.
tips.tip5: Use ceiling fans alongside AC to distribute cool air more evenly.

calculator.title: AC Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Find out exactly what capacity AC you need for your room.

pichon.thinking: Let me calculate the perfect AC for your room...
pichon.result_low: Great news! A {{pk}} PK unit is perfect for your room. Comfortable and efficient!
pichon.result_mid: Your room needs a {{pk}} PK unit. I'd recommend an inverter model for the best efficiency!
pichon.result_high: That's a large space! You'll need a {{pk}} PK unit - or consider two smaller units for better air distribution.
pichon.tip: Remember to clean your filter every month for best performance!

airQuality.title: Indoor Air Quality Guide
airQuality.subtitle: Clean air is just as important as cool air. Here's how to ensure both.

dust.title: Dust & Particulates
dust.body: Accumulated in filters, furniture, and HVAC ducts. Regular cleaning and high-efficiency filters help.

mold.title: Mold & Bacteria
mold.body: Thrive in humid, poorly ventilated spaces. Daikin's Streamer Technology actively eliminates these threats.

allergens.title: Pollen & Allergens
allergens.body: Seasonal allergens that enter through windows and doors. Use AC with active filtration when pollen counts are high.

voc.title: VOCs
voc.body: Volatile organic compounds from paint, furniture, and cleaning products. Good ventilation and air purification help reduce concentrations.

solutions.title: Daikin Air Quality Solutions
solutions.humidity: Built-in humidity control for optimal 40–60% RH

maintenanceTips.title: Maintenance Tips
maintenanceTips.subtitle: Simple steps to keep your Daikin AC running at its best for years.

monthly.title: Monthly
items: Clean the air filter with warm water and mild detergent
Wipe the indoor unit housing with a damp cloth
Check that the drain pipe is flowing freely

quarterly.title: Every 3 Months
items: Inspect the outdoor unit for debris blockage
Check refrigerant lines for frost or condensation

annually.title: Annual
items: Have a technician check refrigerant levels

pichon.tip1: A clean filter can save up to 15% on your electricity bill!
pichon.tip2: Never spray water directly into the indoor unit - always remove the filter first.
pichon.tip3: If you hear a strange noise, turn off the unit and call a technician. Don't ignore it!
pichon.tip4: Keep outdoor units clear of leaves and debris for efficient heat exchange.
